compounds.frequency: 1 puff daily initially, then every other day

benefits.description: Tan building nicely by week 2-3 with sun exposure, shifting to every other day maintenance

side_effects.description: Wife experiences mild nausea 15-20 minutes after nasal spray on empty stomach

protocol_notes: Reports using nasal spray for tanning purposes. Wife's nausea resolved by taking spray after eating breakfast. Vial constituted with 1ml BAC in 10mg total; did not calculate exact mcg per spray.
